descriptions.value: The fifth installment in the Innoquous series. This one!
Innoquous 4, released in 2011, expanded on its predecessors with new game modes, a wealth of extra content, and a new, darker look.
Innoquous 3, from 2009, gave the series a splash of colour, a level select with progress saving for the first time, two extra game modes, and an additional speedrun mode.
Innoquous 2, the runt of the litter released at the beginning of 2009, brought 18 new levels, introduced the running theme of hidden rabbits, and did very little else.

Innoquous, released in 2008, was the result of my seeing a bunch of GameMaker games that used gravity switching, but didn't tilt the view to match. I made one that did. Innoquous' downfall was its woeful lack of content, only containing 10 levels.
Art by M.Sobr
Art by M.Sobr

"No amount of prayer could bring back you back, Mother, but you will be avenged."
"When it comes to matters of family and honour, there is no better remedy for injustice than the sharp point of a sword."
"I'm fixin' to get Old Bill out of our lives for good, darling - and ain't nobody going to stop me."
"I am no salesman, I can assure you of that. My business is of far more dangerous nature."
"Tonight, brother, I will write another of my little murder mysteries ... and you will play the victim."
"I was terribly sorry to hear of your loss, sweet sister."
